content:
Empowering Children Through Awareness | Varanasi 

Bharati Approaching Tomorrow Foundation (BATF) successfully conducted an Awareness Session at Composite Government School, Sundarpur, Varanasi , with the objective of fostering awareness, positive thinking, and responsible decision-making among children.

The interactive session encouraged students to actively participate, ask questions, and gain valuable insights that will help them become confident, informed, and responsible citizens.

We sincerely thank Dr. Suman (Principal) Dr. Alka (In-charge) and Manisha Kumari (Coordinator) for their constant support and cooperation in making this initiative successful.

Together, we remain committed to building an informed, empowered, and brighter future for every child.

comment: Awareness sessions create the strongest impact when followed by consistent mentorship and opportunities for children to apply what they learn in daily decisions.
